# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/OpenBMB/XAgent/issues/342
# repo: OpenBMB/XAgent
# title: TypeError: Object of type date is not JSON serializable

# Last frames in traceback:
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.10/json/encoder.py line 431 in _iterencode
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.10/json/encoder.py line 405 in _iterencode_dict
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.10/json/encoder.py line 325 in _iterencode_list
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.10/json/encoder.py line 405 in _iterencode_dict
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.10/json/encoder.py line 438 in _iterencode
#   /usr/local/lib/python3.10/json/encoder.py line 179 in default

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # ## Issue Description / 问题描述
    # 容器启动后，通过web端上传文件提问，无法得到回复，报错TypeError: Object of type date is not JSON serializable
    # ## Environment / 环境信息
    # - Operating System / 操作系统：win10
    # ## Error Screenshots or Logs / 错误截图或日志
    # 2023-12-15 10:33:21 XAgent-Server               | XAgent Service Init Dependence.
    # 2023-12-15 10:33:21 XAgent-Server               | init a thread pool executor, max_workers: 1
    # 2023-12-15 10:33:21 XAgent-Server               | XAgent Service Init Dependence: Complete!
    raise TypeError('reproduce: see https://github.com/OpenBMB/XAgent/issues/342')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
